title: helichrysum devredii
intro: Helichrysum devredii, also known as the 'Cape Gold', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum devredii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
